claims.summary: Readback must distinguish internal interpretation, peer observation, bridge derivation, and steward-authored material.
claims.disposition: verify ProvenanceRefV1, WitnessFrameV1, context anchors, ownership origins, and exact lineage edges expose observation, derivation, and interpretation without copying private payloads

claims.summary: The system should make predictive or corrective action posture comparable with non-instrumental exploration.
claims.disposition: route a read-only session diagnostic over existing action-continuity receipts; current protected non-control modes are visible but no exact posture ratio matching this claim was found

claims.summary: Provenance transparency is a prerequisite for safely increasing contact or surrender dynamics.
claims.disposition: preserve the current evidence-only boundary; any contact aperture, pressure response, peer mutation, sensory admission, or live-control change requires separate Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
